explanation: This command is a direct match to the Sigma rule and is used as a baseline for testing detection accuracy.
This command uses a slightly modified path in the script reference to test if the detection is path-specific.
This command adds quotes around the command line argument to test if the detection is sensitive to quotation marks.
This command is a variation of the first command with no changes to the URL, used for consistency testing.
This command uses a UNC path to test if the detection is sensitive to different URL formats.
